title: Treatment Patterns and Attrition in Metastatic Castration-Resistant Prostate Cancer.
abstract: Rapid expansion of the therapeutic landscape for metastatic castration-resistant prostate cancer (mCRPC) has increased the complexity of treatment selection and sequencing. However, large, contemporary studies describing treatment patterns and attrition rates in clinical treatment of mCRPC are lacking.
trial_name: Sipuleucel-T immunotherapy for castration-resistant prostate cancer
